name: @lumen/vacancy
description: Vacancy and underuse radar for Dutch housing stock — leegstandsradar.nl

scripts.db:check:nls: cd ../.. && DATABASE_URL="$(sed -n 's/^DATABASE_URL=//p' apps/vacancy/.env | head -n 1)" PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m services.nls.check_db
scripts.db:stats:nls: cd ../.. && DATABASE_URL="$(sed -n 's/^DATABASE_URL=//p' apps/vacancy/.env | head -n 1)" PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m services.nls.stats_db
